root_text.an4.204:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, pisuṇavāco hoti, pharusavāco hoti, samphappalāpī hoti, abhijjhālu hoti, byāpannacitto hoti, micchādiṭṭhiko hoti.
root_text.an4.204:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca pāṇātipātī hoti, parañca pāṇātipāte samādapeti …pe… attanā ca abhijjhālu hoti, parañca abhijjhāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.204:3.3: attanā ca byāpannacitto hoti, parañca byāpāde samādapeti, attanā ca micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca micchādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti.
root_text.an4.204:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti …pe… anabhijjhālu hoti, abyāpannacitto hoti, sammādiṭṭhiko hoti.
root_text.an4.204:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, parañca pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti …pe… attanā ca anabhijjhālu hoti, parañca anabhijjhāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.204:5.3: attanā ca abyāpannacitto hoti, parañca abyāpāde samādapeti;
root_text.an4.204:5.4: attanā ca sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca sammādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti.

translation_text.an4.204:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.an4.204:1.2: a true person and an even truer person.
translation_text.an4.204:2.1: And what is an untrue person?
translation_text.an4.204:2.2: It’s someone who kills living creatures, steals, and commits sexual misconduct. They use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. And they’re covetous, malicious, with wrong view.
translation_text.an4.204:2.3: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.an4.204:3.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.an4.204:3.2: It’s someone who kills living creatures, steals, and commits sexual misconduct. They use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. They’re covetous, malicious, with wrong view. And they encourage others to do these things.
translation_text.an4.204:3.4: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.an4.204:4.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.an4.204:4.2: It’s someone who doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, or commit sexual misconduct. They don’t use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. And they’re contented, kind-hearted, with right view.
translation_text.an4.204:4.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.an4.204:5.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.an4.204:5.2: It’s someone who doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, or commit sexual misconduct. They don’t use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. They’re contented, kind-hearted, with right view. And they encourage others to do these things.
translation_text.an4.204:5.5: This is called an even truer person.”
